titlestmt.titleproper: Finding Aid for the Evan Kleiman Papers LSC.2440
titlestmt.author: Finding aid prepared by Jasmine Larkin, Glen Sturgeon in 2023; Kelly Besser, Azad Namazie in 2026; front matter edited by Caroline Cubé in 2026.

p.date: Online finding aid last updated 2026 March 19.

address.addressline: Room A1713, Charles E. Young Research Library

publicationstmt.p: Finding aid description and metadata in this record are licensed under a Creative Commons Public Domain Designation (CC0 1.0 Universal). See LSC's Metadata Rights Statement for more information.

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2026-03-19 14:01:24 -0700.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: English, Latin script.

did.abstract: Evan Kleiman is a native Angeleno, chef, author, restaurant owner, and radio host. She is the host of Good Food on KCRW, reporting on food in Southern California since 1997. She owned the Angeli Caffe in 1984 and operated it for 28 years. The collection spans 1984-2023 and is comprised of documents, digital files, and photographs. Photographs include personal photographs, photographs of Kleiman's restaurant, and others relating to her work in the culinary industry.
did.physloc: Stored off-site. Advance notice is required for access to the collection. All requests to access special collections material must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Open for research. All requests to access special collections materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

phystech.head: Physical Characteristics and Technical Requirements
phystech.p: CONTAINS DIGITAL MATERIALS: This collection contains processed digital materials. All requests to access digital materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Property rights to the physical objects belong to UCLA Library Special Collections. All other rights, including copyright, are retained by the creators and their heirs. It is the responsibility of the researcher to determine who holds the copyright and pursue the copyright owner or his or her heir for permission to publish where The UC Regents do not hold the copyright.

Digital files located in the digital folders titled "Ann Field Drawings," "Ann Field Menu Illustration," and "Wings" can be accessed by users, but users may not copy, take photographs (or screenshots) of, or use the images in any way. These files should only be viewable in the LSC reading room for research purposes.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: [Identification of item], Evan Kleiman papers (Collection 2440). UCLA Library Special Collections, Charles E. Young Research Library, University of California, Los Angeles.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Digital materials were received on 1 flash drive. All digital file naming, organization, and arrangement created by Evan Kleiman was retained. Digital materials were processed by Glen Sturgeon in 2023 and Azad Namazie in 2026.
Physical files processed by Kelly Besser in 2026.

Collections are processed to a variety of levels depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived user interest and research value, availability of staff and resources, and competing priorities. Library Special Collections provides a standard level of preservation and access for all collections and, when time and resources permit, conducts more intensive processing. These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards and best practices.

We are committed to providing ethical, inclusive, and anti-racist description of the materials we steward, and to remediating existing description of our materials that contains language that may be offensive or cause harm. We invite you to submit feedback about how our collections are described, and how they could be described more accurately, by filling out the form located on our website: Report Problematic Content and Description in UCLA's library collections and archives.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Evan Kleiman is a native Angeleno, chef, author, restaurant owner, and radio host. She is the host of Good Food on KCRW, reporting on food in Southern California since 1997. She is a graduate of UCLA, where she earned bachelors and masters degrees. She owned the Angeli Caffe in 1984 and operated it for 28 years. Kleiman is the author of eight books and has been involved in a variety of organizations such as the Los Angeles chapter of Slow Food and the Los Angeles Food Policy Council.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection spans 1984-2023 and is comprised of documents, digital files, and photographs. Photographs include personal photographs, photographs of Kleiman's restaurant, and others relating to her work in the culinary industry. All materials were created or collected by Kleiman. Most materials relate to her work in the culinary industry, including information about her restaurant, research for her radio show, interviews, and recipes (including drafts of cookbooks).

The digital materials in this acquisition are mostly document files with .docx and .doc extensions. Digital materials also include image files and Google docs that were downloaded and transferred to LSC. Most of the born-digital files were created to support Kleiman's writing and research around the topic of food/culinary culture. She has written books and articles, but most of her activity revolves around her radio show Good Food. The majority of the digital files' content are draft of writings and research notes, and to a lesser extent recipes and photographs. The digital files also include graphic designs and branding for Angeli Caffe. Digital materials date from 2002-2023.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The existing order of the materials by record type was retained.

did.unittitle: Angeli photographs, architectural records, press clippings, and ephemera
The Cold Table binders - first draft Cucina Fresca
Sticks and Stones, A Page a Day Diary, Recipe binders, and notes
Correspondence, school ephemera, photographs, and brochures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copies of Evan Kleiman's cookbooks: Cucina Fresca first edition 1985, Pasta Fresca first edition 1988 signed by Evan Kleiman, Angeli Caffe first edition 1997, The Best of Casual Pizza Oven Cooking first printing 1997. This box also contains a signed copy of New California Cuisine: Great Recipes from the Los Angeles Times which features Kleiman's Arista (pork roast) recipe.

Book titles in this collection have been individually cataloged and can be discovered in the Library catalog. Records for these items may be found by keyword searching this string in the catalog: "Kleiman, Evan, former owner."

phystech.head: Physical Characteristics and Technical Requirements
phystech.p: CONTAINS DIGITAL MATERIALS: This collection contains processed digital materials. All requests to access digital materials must be made in advance using the request button located on this page.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Digital files are mostly .docx, .doc, .jpg, and .tif files related to Kleiman's research, writing, and recipes pertaining to global food and culinary cultures. They also include graphic design art and branding for her Los Angeles restaurant, Angeli Caffe.
